summary: Plan-only classification for PR inventory mixed shard. No GitHub mutations planned: merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal and instant-close are disabled, and this shard has no shared canonical. Security-sensitive PRs are routed item-by-item; already-closed candidate PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review, proof, or active repair outside this cleanup shard.
